steps.title: Use slope for the rate
steps.content: The predicted increase in total fat for each $1$ gram increase in total protein is the slope of the line of best fit.

steps.title: Estimate from two line points
steps.content: Two approximate points on the line are $(20,34)$ and $(30,48)$.

steps.title: Compute the slope
steps.content: $$m=\frac{48-34}{30-20}=\frac{14}{10}=1.4$$The closest choice to $1.4$ is $1.5$. The answer is C.
